videos.headline: Tyler Warren climbs the ladder for a slick one-handed catch
videos.description: Tyler Warren gets up and somehow comes down with a one-handed grab for Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Warren climbs the ladder for a slick one-handed catch) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devin Kargman carted off after injury on 2nd play of game
